description: CompositionBlack V-neck pullover with green, grey and cream stripes, made of an acrylic and wool blend, a ribbed neckline and cuffs, and has a metallic appliqué on the chestFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryWinter is back! Step out and celebrate the winter chill in the warmth of this pullover from scullers. Put it over a round neck t-shirt or just a vest, and pair it with jeans and sports shoes for that warm touch while you enjoy steaming hot street food in the cold.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in pulloversHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
